action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy 21.32% with CLIP ViT-B/16 + SWAD. AugReg training failed multiple times due to incomplete/truncated scripts. Analysis: Need a complete, working training script for AugReg ViT-B/16 to ensemble with CLIP. Diverse backbones (vision-language vs supervised IN-1k) should improve OOD generalization. Decision: Write complete train_augreg.py, train 15 epochs with SWAD, update predict.py for ensemble, submit eval.
